description: Composition Pink kurta with white leaf print, made of 100% cotton, has a small mandarin collar with a V-neck and a pin tucked placket, mirror and embroidery work along the yoke, three-quarter sleeves with white piping at the hem and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Wear your art on the go and flaunt your ethno-modern sense of style with ease by slipping into this kurta from aneri. The cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the mirror work on the yoke heightens the fashion statement of this kurta. Team it with dark pink or white leggings and chunky earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
